data.title: 国际服三周年感谢信
data.summary: "Thank you for the last 3 years, Sensei! ❤💙" Arona and Plana prepared a video message for Sensei to
data.body:
"Thank you for the last 3 years, Sensei! ❤💙"
Arona and Plana prepared a video message for Sensei to show their gratitude!
We have also prepared a 3rd Anniversary celebratory message so please check it in the notice below!

➡️Forum: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=2679788
➡️Arona&Plana's video message: https://youtu.be/5W5lJkkqS-U
